idea-plugin.name: DataClass Keep
idea-plugin.description:
Detects Kotlin data classes and Retrofit response classes missing the @Keep annotation, preventing ProGuard/R8 from stripping them during minification.

Features:
  • Warns when a data class is missing @Keep
  • Warns when Retrofit response classes are missing @Keep
  • One-click quick fix to add @Keep automatically
  • Supports GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, PATCH, HEAD annotations
Why use this?
When building release APKs, ProGuard/R8 renames or removes classes. Data classes used in Gson, Retrofit, or Room can cause runtime crashes if not annotated with @Keep. This catches the problem at edit time before it reaches production.
